bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=chief-strategist Items: 3 · Forecasts emitted: 16 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-07-08 · [research_task] Examine haircut/forced-sell and broker ECL spillover

DONE · owner=chief-strategist · research discussion=Examine haircut/forced-sell and broker ECL spillover (led by chief-strategist)

Investigate haircut/forced-sell口径 and broker ECL spillover risk. Reference: Section 2.

  • Outcome: research discussion "Examine haircut/forced-sell and broker ECL spillover" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 本报告为终局综合卡，将十卡线程固化为单一、可执行、可审计的全天候投资授权书。批准 20/10/17.5/18/34.5 SAA 权重，并将对冲叠加由酌情升级为强制且规则触发：单一状态变量 P_t 由三触发（3M NCD>35bp、赎回≥5.8%、USD/CNH→7.40）机械映射到利率对冲比率 20%/60%/80%、预授权银行减配 10%→8% 及 −4.0% 硬止损。在约 20bp/年对冲成本拖累（黄金期权净权利金≈0.15%/年 + 期货基差≈0.05%/年）下，净夏普基本保持（≈0.64 对比毛值 0.6…

  • Forecasts: 11 (0 positions); tickers: SHFE, BLUF, TF, OKF, CMR, 000538.SZ

2026-07-08 · [research_task] Investigate STAR50 ETF bid durability

DONE · owner=chief-strategist · research discussion=Investigate STAR50 ETF bid durability (led by chief-strategist)

Assess if STAR50 ETF bid is durable against semi mgn selling/snowball knock-in. Reference: Section 2.

  • Outcome: research discussion "Investigate STAR50 ETF bid durability" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 截至2026-07-03，完成了对避险组合再平衡路径与风险预算的最终合规性审计。最终确定的50/50物理红利与国债/现金引流权重（Option B）确保组合99%日度VaR在5B、10B及50B AUM规模下控制在-2.48%至-2.74%之间，符合-3.00%合规红线，避免了Option C中因关联度骤增引发的-2.87%至-2.92%的临界违规。研究轨迹逻辑闭环，数据流动无断裂，全案日期统一定量锚定在2026-07-03，予以PASS审核并结题。 | → 5 forecast(s) on STAR,CFFEX,CMR,SFISF,600…

  • Forecasts: 5 (0 positions); tickers: STAR, CFFEX, CMR, SFISF, 600900.SH

2026-07-06 · [cross_analyst_review] 确认 Option 4 极致避险情景触发条件

DONE · owner=chief-strategist

与 ashare-strategist/chief-strategist 协作，确认该情景是否仅作为尾部压力保留，避免与最新两融事实冲突。

  • Outcome: Confirmed Option 4 as a tail stress-test scenario in Section 5.2, aligning with the actual 3-trillion margin balance and PBOC liquidity injection.
